surface_verification.runner: uv run --directory plugins/shipwright-grade --extra dev pytest tests/ -q

behaviors.behavior: Tier-2 test-check regex narrowed to test-specific tokens: a green build/ci/lint check no longer counts as a passing test check (no inflated test-health); common runners (jest/rspec/cypress/tox) still count
security_signal URL-encodes the default-branch ref so a name with #/?/&/space can't break or inject into the code-scanning query; path-style branch slashes preserved
SARIF path (JSON, XXE-safe by construction) treats XML-lookalike strings (<!DOCTYPE>/<script>/&xxe;) as inert opaque content — no XML parsing, no crash, findings still counted

Golden regression strengthened to a full-report byte-identical snapshot for a canonical dashboard-like fixture (oversize_file_ratio=None) — any drift in score/precision/detail/anchor/reason/verdict fails
